$comment: Maximum allowed skipped-test markers (it.skip/test.skip/describe.skip/xit/xdescribe) across the repo. Checked by scripts/check-skip-budget.mjs in the unit-tests workflow. Lower freely; raising requires justification in the PR. Raised 50->53 (2026-07-01): +6 documented skips from the integration burn-down (3 dead legacy EmailProviderService files, 2 Temporal-cutover suites pending port to ee/temporal-workflows, 1 project-survey production gap) offset by -3 previously-skipped now-unskipped elsewhere; each skip site carries its rationale inline.
